commit e5c8de4

Date: Tue Jan 14 2026

Initial SDK implementation - 100% architecture compliant

- Added IAM context injection for MCP tool security
- Implemented Ed25519 public key-based delegation
- Enhanced IntentToken model with policy_validation and step_proofs
- Created comprehensive documentation (8 guides)
- Added 4 working examples including loan delegation workflow

- All unit tests passing

## Next Steps

### 1. Create Pull Request (Recommended)
```bash
# Go to GitHub and create PR from develop -> main
# URL: https://github.com/armoriq/armoriq-sdk-python/compare/main...develop
```

### 2. Continue Development
```bash
# Create feature branch from develop
cd /home/hari/Videos/Armoriq/armoriq-sdk-python
git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name

# Make changes, commit, and push
git add .
git commit -m "Add your feature"
git push -u origin feature/your-feature-name
```

### 3. Keep Develop Updated
```bash
# Pull latest changes
git checkout develop
git pull origin develop

# Merge feature branches
git merge feature/your-feature-name
git push origin develop
```

---

## Branch Protection Rules

The `main` branch has protection rules enabled:
- ❌ Cannot push directly to main
- ✅ Must use pull requests
- ✅ Requires review before merging
- ✅ Status checks may be required

**Solution:** Always work in `develop` or feature branches, then create PR to merge to main.
